alert: The edge is returning 503s after all web backends were marked unhealthy.
root_cause: load balancer health check path misconfigured

evidence_descriptions.inspect_logs:load_balancer: Load balancer logs show healthy web backends failing the wrong health check path.
evidence_descriptions.inspect_config:load_balancer:HEALTH_CHEC: Load balancer config has HEALTH_CHECK_PATH set to /status instead of /healthz.
evidence_descriptions.inspect_metrics:load_balancer: Load balancer metrics show zero healthy backends while web metrics are otherwise normal.

logs: ERROR no healthy backends available for listener=https

expected_action_pattern: resolve_incident(load balancer health check path misconfigured, update health check path)
distractors: Restarting web_server can appear plausible because backends are unhealthy, but the path config is wrong.
